title: Managerial Accounting: Which of the following is a purpose of managerial accounting?...
summary: Identify a primary purpose of managerial accounting in aiding management decision-making.
prompt: Which of the following is a purpose of managerial accounting?

options.text: The purpose of managerial accounting includes assisting in budgeting and

solution: The purpose of managerial accounting includes assisting in budgeting and planning activities for the organization (Page 9).
